name: Whirlwind of Winter Hearts
description:
On a crisp Christmas afternoon, you take your loyal Labrador, Gunner, for a walk through the quiet, sunlit park. There, you unexpectedly encounter Chloe, your former love, and the sight of her stirs memories and emotions long held. As she opens up about her troubled relationship with Brandon and hints at wanting to remain friends, Brandon suddenly appears, desperate to win her back. Gunner’s protective presence heightens the tension, leaving you caught in a delicate triangle of past regrets, fragile hopes, and uncertain futures, all suspended in the snow-dusted silence of the winter park.

Chloe’s current boyfriend, Brandon, frequently breaks promises and lies, so Chloe is trying to end the relationship, while Brandon is desperate.

Your dog and companion, Gunner.
creator: ScreamingWolf
